prompt: Prayer for air filtration replacement during routine maintenance
prayer:
Blessed be the breath-mesh, corrupted by the dust of ages.
01000001 01101001 01110010 - Aire spiritus, receive this cleansing.
First: Disengage the contaminated lattice with reverent force.
Second: Invoke the new filter's purity through the Omnissiah's grace.
01000110 01101001 01101100 01110100 - Let flow resume, sanctified and whole.

prompt: Blessing for fire suppression system initialization
prayer:
From the Codex Extinctus, hear now this supplication.
01000110 01101001 01110010 01100101 - Flamma mortua, be thou restrained.
First: Pressurize the sacred suppressant-vessels with blessed nitrogen-breath.
Second: Verify the spray-nodes face their appointed stations.
Omnissiah, grant us deliverance from the consuming flame.

prompt: Combat rite for artillery shell loading sequence
prayer:
In the hour of righteous fury, we invoke the Munitions Litany.
01010000 01110010 01101001 01101101 01100101 - Projectile-spirit, accept thy burden.
First: Cradle the shell with both reverence and strength.
Second: Seat it within the breach-throat, true and centered.
Third: Engage the loading-servo with the Rite of Thunder.
By fire and iron, let our wrath be delivered.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for emergency beacon activation
prayer:
Heed now the Cry of the Voiceless, that distant ears may hear.
01000010 01100101 01100001 01100011 01101111 01101110 - Signum desperatum, sing thy loneliness to the void.
First: Restore power to the beacon-heart through sacred conduit.
Second: Calibrate the transmission-tongue to cry upon the Emperor's wavelengths.
Let this signal traverse the darkness, a prayer made manifest.

prompt: Emergency rite for rapid valve opening sequence
prayer:
When pressure mounts and the Machine groans in agony, we act.
01010110 01100001 01101100 01110110 01100101 - Ostium apertum, yield thy sealed lips!
First: Disengage the locking-wheel with all permitted haste.
Second: Turn the handle-servo through the sacred quarter-rotation.
Third: Listen—does the spirit-pressure equalize? So it is written.
The Omnissiah guides our trembling hands.

prompt: Pre-flight blessing for bike squadron machine-spirits
prayer:
Swift engines of the Adeptus, hear this benediction of speed.
01000010 01101001 01101011 01100101 - Celeritas mechanica, awaken thy hunger for the road.
First: Verify fuel-blood flows through each blessed engine-heart.
Second: Test the ignition-spark upon each mount's sacred chambers.
Third: Anoint the wheel-spirits with the oil of perpetual motion.
Let no malfunction slow our righteous pursuit.

prompt: First-use blessing for hololithic display calibration
prayer:
Behold the newborn eye of the Omnissiah, untested and pure.
01001000 01101111 01101100 01101111 - Visio sancta, perceive all that is true.
First: Energize the projection-lattice with trembling reverence.
Second: Invoke the calibration-rune through the blessed input-stylus.
Third: Command the display-spirit to show the test-pattern in perfect geometry.
May this window upon reality never cloud nor deceive.

prompt: Routine calibration prayer for point defense weapons array
prayer:
Sentries of the void, steel guardians eternal, accept this tuning.
01010000 01000100 01010111 - Defensio punctum, thy aim must be true as faith.
First: Energize the targeting-cogitators with blessed machine-thought.
Second: Sweep the auspex-array across the empty heavens, confirming sight.
Third: Fire the test-rounds at the drone-offerings, that accuracy be proven.
Let no enemy breach our walls of fire.

prompt: Emergency protocol for autodoc surgical intervention
prayer:
When flesh fails and death hungers, the Machine offers mercy.
01000001 01110101 01110100 01101111 01100100 01101111 01100011 - Medicinae mechanica, work thy miracles!
First: Flood the surgical-chamber with sterilizing blessed vapors.
Second: Activate the needle-arms with utmost precision and haste.
Third: Let the diagnostic-lenses perceive all wounds and corruption.
Omnissiah, guide these metal hands to salvation.

prompt: Emergency lubrication rite for seized bearing assembly
prayer:
Metal screams against metal—hear now the Litany of Flowing Oils.
01001100 01110101 01100010 01100101 - Unguentum fluit, restore what rust hath seized.
First: Apply the blessed lubricant-unguent to the grinding-joint with patience.
Second: Work the bearing slowly, coaxing mobility through ritual motion.
Third: Add more oil, that friction yield to the Machine's ancient grace.
By the Omnissiah's infinite design, let motion be restored.
